text: ICSE 2026 was held in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil (April 12-18, 2026), and Prof. Mira Mezini served as Program Co-Chair.

AIware Best Benchmark Paper Award 2025: Daniel Maninger, Leon Chemnitz, Amir Molzam Sharifloo, Jannis Brugger, and Mira Mezini received the award for "Benchmarking LLMs in Web API Integration Tasks" (Benchmark and Datasets @ AIware 2025).
The SecureCoder JetBrains Plugin is now available on the JetBrains Marketplace, bringing real-time vulnerability highlighting into your IDE.
